items.raw_desc: Oktatókészlet Captain Smart Logic:The Captain Smart Logic educational set is a logic game designed for children from 3 years old, which develops thinking, observation skills and hand-eye coordination in a natural and playful way. By putting puzzles together, children learn the basic principles of the world around them - learning to understand opposites, connections and simple causal relationships, for example where food comes from or how individual phenomena relate to each other. The game is suitable for both single and multiplayer play and offers short play periods of approximately 10-20 minutes, which is suitable for the concentration of smaller children. Thanks to the different types of pieces, the game gradually changes and encourages systematic thinking and logic development without pressure on performance.
